mapper.sql: id, resource_name, resource_type, resource_suffix, resource_size, resource_path, resource_label, resource_desc, create_time, is_delete, old_resourcename, version, last_access_time
mapper.select: select r.id rid, resource_name, resource_size, type_name from t_class_resource cr join t_resource r on cr.fk_resource_id = r.id left join t_resource_type rt on r.fk_resource_type_id = rt.id where cr.fk_class_id = #{classId} and r.is_delete = 1 and rt.is_delete = 1
mapper.delete: delete from t_class_resource where fk_class_id = #{cid} and fk_resource_id = #{rid}
mapper.select: select r.id rid, resource_name, resource_size, resource_suffix, r.create_time r_create_time, type_name from t_resource r left join t_resource_type rt on r.fk_resource_type_id = rt.id where r.is_delete = 1 and rt.is_delete = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_class_resource (fk_class_id, fk_resource_id) VALUES (#{cid}, #{rid}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE fk_class_id = fk_class_id;
